titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of NRS GD45/13/221

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=170 status=live modified=2017-07-07 09:45:14.727312+00 | translation moa=171 status=live modified=2017-07-07 10:00:45.19291+00

p.cl: Rodbertus dei gratia humilis minister ecclesie Sancti Andree . Omnibus sancte matris ecclesie filiis  salutem. et episcopalem benedictionem .

Sciant omnes tam presentes quam futuri me dedisse et presentis carte munimine confirmasse ecclesie sancte CRUCIS de edenesburch
et canonicis ibidem deo seruientibus ecclesiam de karreden cum duobus carrucatis terre. et cum omnibus ad eam iuste perti
nentibus . Scilicet in decimis . in pratis . in pascuis . in molendinis . et in omnibus aliis rectitudinibus suis . ita liberam
et ex omni exactione quietam sicut aliquam in tota diocesi nostra ecclesiam liberius et quietius possident .

His testibus . Gaufrido
abbate de dunfermelin . Alwredo abbate de striuelin . Rodberto priore de Sancto Andrea . Samsone et Alano monachis
dunelmi . T . Archidiacono . Aiulfo decano . Gaufrido de laswade . Magistro Andrea . Adam et Ricardo capellanis episcopi . Gaufrido
clerico . Petro de Striuelin . et plenaria synodo .
Robert, by the grace of God a humble servant of the church of Saint Andrew, sends greeting and episcopal blessing to all sons of Holy Mother Church.

Let all people, as well present as future, know me to have given, and by the guarantee of this charter to have made firm, to the church of the Holyrood in Edinburgh, and to the canons serving God there, the church of Carriden, with two ploughgates of land, and with everything rightfully belonging to it; that is to say, in teinds, in meadows, in pastures, in mills, and in all its other rights; so free and quit of all exaction as they freely and quietly possess any church in the whole diocese .
